doc_class_description: A Court of Appeal judgment is a higher court ruling that reviews decisions of lower courts, shaping legal precedent and protecting citizens’ rights.

latest_doc_d.description: Christie Vivian Rodrigo 2. Dhammika Rodrigo 3. JayarajAmarasiri alias Jayanath 4. Jayanatha Rodrigo 5. Chintha Rodrigo Vs. The Hon. Attorney General before Hon. Amal Ranaraja, J.

latest_doc_d.keywords: Sentencing – Aggravating circumstances – Mitigating circunstances – Characteristics warranting incarceration – Matters for a suspension of a custodial sentence
